name: Aria
description: Single-room glance dashboard: greeting, climate, light and switch toggles, a 24h temperature curve, and scenes. Warm, calm, light-first.

name: Grid
description: Compact Material 3 tile grid for many devices at a glance, grouped by area, tap to toggle. Light and dark.

name: Pulse
description: Sensor and monitoring panel: live readouts with tabular numerals, animated sparklines, and a radial gauge. Quiet, data-forward, dark.

name: Halcyon
description: Flagship premium dashboard. Buy once on the store, then install via URL or upload.
